response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of strong individual-contributor experience with genuine relevant exposure to developer tooling and testing infrastructure (built the Trial test runner and Fluent-Asserts library, set up CI/CD and GitLab/Docker infrastructure, taught TDD and Selenium courses, and now works on AI-agent/MCP developer tooling). However, this is a people-leadership role with a hard requirement of 2 years in people management or team leadership, and the resume shows no direct reports, no formal management track, and no organizational-change experience. Mobile-platform-at-scale experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work years ago). The technical foundation is solid but the core management qualification is unmet.
strengths: Direct hands-on developer-tooling experience: built test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure
Long, varied engineering track record across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with strong TDD/craftsmanship focus
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing via workshops, dojos, and a multi-module Selenium course
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — the role's core 2-year requirement
No stated experience leading organizational change or setting team roadmaps/performance expectations
Limited recent, large-scale mobile-platform ecosystem experience
